## Meeting Purpose

[Sprint check-in and product update discussion for Augment Code and GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/NWQP2h-h8LtkMBxq6xYh5AMyPCNyu4eU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content growth continues (\~10% increase from last week), with 30 new product evaluation articles](https://fathom.video/share/NWQP2h-h8LtkMBxq6xYh5AMyPCNyu4eU?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Domain rating up 5 points in 3 weeks due to backlink strategy (30-40 delivered)](https://fathom.video/share/NWQP2h-h8LtkMBxq6xYh5AMyPCNyu4eU?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [New PRD for custom command feature on website discussed, including user-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/NWQP2h-h8LtkMBxq6xYh5AMyPCNyu4eU?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Need for comprehensive performance report on content strategy (2 months in)](https://fathom.video/share/NWQP2h-h8LtkMBxq6xYh5AMyPCNyu4eU?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Progress
